name: visual-design
description: Visual design system toolkit with UX/usability expert review. Consultant skill for establishing design systems via interview or site extraction with page discovery, parallel fingerprinting, fluid responsive detection, and custom component motion discovery. Component-context skill with fuzzy matching for on-demand spec delivery. Design-reviewer skill and agent for live visual quality gate testing via chrome-devtools-mcp — includes Nielsen's 10 Usability Heuristics framework with UX scoring (0-100), diff mode for follow-up reviews, consultant synergy (review-checklist.md), functional/behavior-change escalation tags on fix suggestions, and Categories A-F split into phase files. Fully report-only with categorized fix suggestions. Uses opus agent with haiku sub-agent for cost-efficient mechanical inspection dispatch. Update-component-index skill for regenerating the component compendium index.
